name: Input
description: A standalone styled text input that automatically integrates with Field for validation. Built on Base UI Input with StyleX styling.

Root.description: A native <input> element with StyleX styling. Automatically integrates with Field.Root for validation state when nested inside one.

size.description: Size of the input affecting height, padding, and font size. Matches Button sizes (sm=32px, md=36px, lg=40px).

onValueChange.description: Callback fired when the value changes. Use when controlled.

dataAttributes.data-valid: Present when the field is valid.
dataAttributes.data-invalid: Present when the field is invalid.
dataAttributes.data-dirty: Present when the field value has been modified.
dataAttributes.data-touched: Present when the field has been focused and blurred.
dataAttributes.data-filled: Present when the input has a non-empty value.
dataAttributes.data-focused: Present when the input is focused.
dataAttributes.data-disabled: Present when the input is disabled.

intents.reasoning: Input is the primary component for standalone text entry. Use when you need a simple text input without the full Field wrapper.
Input automatically integrates with Field for label, description, and validation when nested inside Field.Root.
Input works well as a simple search box. For search with suggestions, use Autocomplete instead.

avoidWhen.scenario: Search input with filtered suggestion dropdown
avoidWhen.reasoning: Use Autocomplete which provides the popup and filtering logic.

avoidWhen.scenario: Selecting from a predefined list of options
avoidWhen.reasoning: Use Select or Combobox for option selection, not a free-text input.
Input renders a single-line <input>. Use a <textarea> or Field.Control with render prop for multi-line.

examples.name: sizes
examples.code:
<>
  <Input size="sm" placeholder="Small" />
  <Input size="md" placeholder="Medium" />
  <Input size="lg" placeholder="Large" />
</>

examples.name: with-field
examples.description: Input inside a Field for label and validation
examples.code:
<Field.Root>
  <Field.Label>Email</Field.Label>
  <Input type="email" required placeholder="you@example.com" />
  <Field.Error match="typeMismatch">Please enter a valid email.</Field.Error>
</Field.Root>
